property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files (x86)\Razer Chroma SDK in;C:\Program Files\Razer Chroma SDK in;C:\Program Files (x86)\Razer\ChromaBroadcast in;C:\Program Files\Razer\ChromaBroadcast in;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\ProgramData\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Users\Esteban Dauchy\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Esteban Dauchy\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\WINDOWS\system32\config\systemprofile\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Logiciels\php8.2;C:\sqlite;C:\Gradle\gradle-8.10\gradle-8.10.1 in;C:\Graphviz-12.2.1-win64 in;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey in;%NVM_HOME%;%NVM_SYMLINK%;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\Program Files\Go in;C:\Users\Esteban Dauchy\scoop\shims;C:\Users\Esteban Dauchy\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Esteban Dauchy\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\Esteban Dauchy\AppData\Local\JetBrains\Toolbox\scripts;C:\Users\Esteban Dauchy\AppData\Local\ComposerSetup in;C:\Users\Esteban Dauchy\AppData\Roaming\Composer\vendor in;C:\Users\Esteban Dauchy\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Logiciels\php8.2;C:\Gradle\gradle-8.3 in;C:\Users\Esteban Dauchy\AppData\Roaming

vm;C:
vm4w
odejs;C:\Users\Esteban Dauchy\AppData\Local\Programs\cursoresources\app in;C:\Users\Esteban Dauchy\go in;.

testcase.name: Successful account registration
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Successful account registration &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/account-creation.feature:3&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mthe registration form is available&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.AccountSteps.theRegistrationFormIsAvailable()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mno user exists with username &amp#27;[1m"alice"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.AccountSteps.noUserExistsWithUsername(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user registers with email &amp#27;[1m"alice@example.com"&amp#27;[22m, username &amp#27;[1m"alice"&amp#27;[22m and password &amp#27;[1m"Secret1!"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.AccountSteps.theUserRegisters(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe registration confirmation should be &amp#27;[1m"Account created successfully for alice"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.AccountSteps.theRegistrationConfirmationShouldBe(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe user repository should have saved &amp#27;[1m"alice"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.AccountSteps.theUserRepositoryShouldHaveSaved(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m
testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\Esteban Dauchy\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.7\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.7.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: Registration fails when username already exists
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Registration fails when username already exists &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/account-creation.feature:10&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mthe registration form is available&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.AccountSteps.theRegistrationFormIsAvailable()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22ma user already exists with username &amp#27;[1m"bob"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.AccountSteps.aUserAlreadyExistsWithUsername(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user tries to register with email &amp#27;[1m"bob2@example.com"&amp#27;[22m, username &amp#27;[1m"bob"&amp#27;[22m and password &amp#27;[1m"Secret1!"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.AccountSteps.theUserTriesToRegister(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22ma registration error should be returned with message &amp#27;[1m"Username already exists"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.AccountSteps.aRegistrationErrorShouldBeReturnedWithMessage(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Add a new product to cart
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Add a new product to cart &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/add-to-cart.feature:3&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mcart &amp#27;[1m"cart-1"&amp#27;[22m exists&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.cartExists(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mproduct &amp#27;[1m"P001"&amp#27;[22m exists&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.productExists(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mproduct &amp#27;[1m"P001"&amp#27;[22m is not in cart &amp#27;[1m"cart-1"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.productIsNotInCart(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user adds product &amp#27;[1m"P001"&amp#27;[22m to cart &amp#27;[1m"cart-1"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.theUserAddsProductToCart(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe add to cart confirmation should be &amp#27;[1m"Product P001 added to cart"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.theAddToCartConfirmationShouldBe(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mcart &amp#27;[1m"cart-1"&amp#27;[22m should contain product &amp#27;[1m"P001"&amp#27;[22m with quantity &amp#27;[1m1&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.cartShouldContainProductWithQuantity(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Increase quantity when product already in cart
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Increase quantity when product already in cart &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/add-to-cart.feature:11&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mcart &amp#27;[1m"cart-2"&amp#27;[22m exists&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.cartExists(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mproduct &amp#27;[1m"P002"&amp#27;[22m exists&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.productExists(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mproduct &amp#27;[1m"P002"&amp#27;[22m is already in cart &amp#27;[1m"cart-2"&amp#27;[22m with quantity &amp#27;[1m2&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.productIsAlreadyInCartWithQuantity(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user adds product &amp#27;[1m"P002"&amp#27;[22m to cart &amp#27;[1m"cart-2"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.theUserAddsProductToCart(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe add to cart confirmation should be &amp#27;[1m"Product P002 added to cart"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.theAddToCartConfirmationShouldBe(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mcart &amp#27;[1m"cart-2"&amp#27;[22m should contain product &amp#27;[1m"P002"&amp#27;[22m with quantity &amp#27;[1m3&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.cartShouldContainProductWithQuantity(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Add to cart fails when cart does not exist
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Add to cart fails when cart does not exist &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/add-to-cart.feature:19&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mcart &amp#27;[1m"cart-missing"&amp#27;[22m does not exist&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.cartDoesNotExist(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mproduct &amp#27;[1m"P003"&amp#27;[22m exists&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.productExists(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user tries to add product &amp#27;[1m"P003"&amp#27;[22m to cart &amp#27;[1m"cart-missing"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.theUserTriesToAddProductToCart(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22ma cart error should be returned with message &amp#27;[1m"Cart does not exist"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.aCartErrorShouldBeReturnedWithMessage(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Browse products by category
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Browse products by category &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/category-navigation.feature:3&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mthe categories page is available&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.ProductSteps.theCategoriesPageIsAvailable()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe product repository returns products for category &amp#27;[1m"Electronics"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.ProductSteps.theProductRepositoryReturnsProductsForCategory(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user selects category &amp#27;[1m"Electronics"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.ProductSteps.theUserSelectsCategory(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe category results should contain &amp#27;[1m2&amp#27;[22m products&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.ProductSteps.theCategoryResultsShouldContainProducts(int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe product repository should have been queried with category &amp#27;[1m"Electronics"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.ProductSteps.theProductRepositoryShouldHaveBeenQueriedWithCategory(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Successful login redirects to home page
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Successful login redirects to home page &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/login.feature:3&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mthe login form is available&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.LoginSteps.theLoginFormIsAvailable()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22muser &amp#27;[1m"carol"&amp#27;[22m can authenticate with password &amp#27;[1m"Secret1!"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.LoginSteps.userCanAuthenticate(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user logs in with username &amp#27;[1m"carol"&amp#27;[22m and password &amp#27;[1m"Secret1!"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.LoginSteps.theUserLogsIn(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe login should be successful&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.LoginSteps.theLoginShouldBeSuccessful()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe user should be redirected to the home page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.LoginSteps.theUserShouldBeRedirectedToHomePage()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe login message should be &amp#27;[1m"Welcome carol"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.LoginSteps.theLoginMessageShouldBe(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Failed login shows error message
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Failed login shows error message &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/login.feature:11&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mthe login form is available&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.LoginSteps.theLoginFormIsAvailable()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22muser &amp#27;[1m"dave"&amp#27;[22m cannot authenticate with password &amp#27;[1m"WrongPass!"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.LoginSteps.userCannotAuthenticate(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user logs in with username &amp#27;[1m"dave"&amp#27;[22m and password &amp#27;[1m"WrongPass!"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.LoginSteps.theUserLogsIn(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe login should fail&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.LoginSteps.theLoginShouldFail()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe login message should be &amp#27;[1m"Invalid username or password"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.LoginSteps.theLoginMessageShouldBe(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe user should not be redirected to the home page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.LoginSteps.theUserShouldNotBeRedirectedToHomePage()&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Validate an existing order
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Validate an existing order &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/order-validation.feature:3&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mcart &amp#27;[1m"cart-6"&amp#27;[22m exists&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.cartExists(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user validates order for cart &amp#27;[1m"cart-6"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.theUserValidatesOrderForCart(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe order confirmation should be &amp#27;[1m"Order validated successfully for cart cart-6"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.theOrderConfirmationShouldBe(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mcart &amp#27;[1m"cart-6"&amp#27;[22m should be validated&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.cartShouldBeValidated(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Validation fails when cart does not exist
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Validation fails when cart does not exist &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/order-validation.feature:9&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mcart &amp#27;[1m"cart-missing-3"&amp#27;[22m does not exist&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.cartDoesNotExist(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user tries to validate order for cart &amp#27;[1m"cart-missing-3"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.theUserTriesToValidateOrderForCart(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22ma cart error should be returned with message &amp#27;[1m"Cart does not exist"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.aCartErrorShouldBeReturnedWithMessage(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Search products by keyword
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Search products by keyword &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/product-search.feature:3&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mthe search bar is available&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.ProductSteps.theSearchBarIsAvailable()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe product repository returns products for keyword &amp#27;[1m"phone"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.ProductSteps.theProductRepositoryReturnsProductsForKeyword(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user searches for keyword &amp#27;[1m"phone"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.ProductSteps.theUserSearchesForKeyword(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe search results should contain &amp#27;[1m2&amp#27;[22m products&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.ProductSteps.theSearchResultsShouldContainProducts(int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe product repository should have been queried with keyword &amp#27;[1m"phone"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.ProductSteps.theProductRepositoryShouldHaveBeenQueriedWithKeyword(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Search products by maximum price
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Search products by maximum price &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/product-search.feature:10&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mthe search bar is available&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.ProductSteps.theSearchBarIsAvailable()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe product repository returns products with max price &amp#27;[1m50.0&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.ProductSteps.theProductRepositoryReturnsProductsWithMaxPrice(double)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user searches for products with max price &amp#27;[1m50.0&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.ProductSteps.theUserSearchesForProductsWithMaxPrice(double)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe search results should contain &amp#27;[1m1&amp#27;[22m products&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.ProductSteps.theSearchResultsShouldContainProducts(int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe product repository should have been queried with max price &amp#27;[1m50.0&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.ProductSteps.theProductRepositoryShouldHaveBeenQueriedWithMaxPrice(double)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Decrease quantity when product quantity is greater than one
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Decrease quantity when product quantity is greater than one &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/remove-from-cart.feature:3&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mcart &amp#27;[1m"cart-3"&amp#27;[22m exists&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.cartExists(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mproduct &amp#27;[1m"P004"&amp#27;[22m is already in cart &amp#27;[1m"cart-3"&amp#27;[22m with quantity &amp#27;[1m3&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.productIsAlreadyInCartWithQuantity(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user removes product &amp#27;[1m"P004"&amp#27;[22m from cart &amp#27;[1m"cart-3"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.theUserRemovesProductFromCart(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mcart &amp#27;[1m"cart-3"&amp#27;[22m should have product &amp#27;[1m"P004"&amp#27;[22m quantity decreased&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.cartShouldHaveProductQuantityDecreased(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Remove product when quantity equals one
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Remove product when quantity equals one &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/remove-from-cart.feature:9&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mcart &amp#27;[1m"cart-4"&amp#27;[22m exists&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.cartExists(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mproduct &amp#27;[1m"P005"&amp#27;[22m is already in cart &amp#27;[1m"cart-4"&amp#27;[22m with quantity &amp#27;[1m1&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.productIsAlreadyInCartWithQuantity(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user removes product &amp#27;[1m"P005"&amp#27;[22m from cart &amp#27;[1m"cart-4"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.theUserRemovesProductFromCart(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mproduct &amp#27;[1m"P005"&amp#27;[22m should be removed from cart &amp#27;[1m"cart-4"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.productShouldBeRemovedFromCart(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Remove fails when product is not in cart
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Remove fails when product is not in cart &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/remove-from-cart.feature:15&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mcart &amp#27;[1m"cart-5"&amp#27;[22m exists&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.cartExists(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mproduct &amp#27;[1m"P006"&amp#27;[22m is not in cart &amp#27;[1m"cart-5"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.productIsNotInCart(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user tries to remove product &amp#27;[1m"P006"&amp#27;[22m from cart &amp#27;[1m"cart-5"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.theUserTriesToRemoveProductFromCart(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22ma cart error should be returned with message &amp#27;[1m"Product not in cart"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.aCartErrorShouldBeReturnedWithMessage(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Remove fails when cart does not exist
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Remove fails when cart does not exist &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/remove-from-cart.feature:21&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mcart &amp#27;[1m"cart-missing-2"&amp#27;[22m does not exist&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.cartDoesNotExist(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user tries to remove product &amp#27;[1m"P007"&amp#27;[22m from cart &amp#27;[1m"cart-missing-2"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.theUserTriesToRemoveProductFromCart(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22ma cart error should be returned with message &amp#27;[1m"Cart does not exist"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CartSteps.aCartErrorShouldBeReturnedWithMessage(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m
